what_it_solves: Counts only conversions Meta drove. Cleaner ROAS reads.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Account Settings → Attribution Setting → enable Incremental Attribution
Confirm with analytics team to avoid double-counting in BI dashboards
Add 'Incremental Conversions' column in reporting view
Re-baseline ROAS reads after 14d to capture cleaner attribution

what_it_solves: Creator/UGC signal at scale. Brand amplification format.
activate_it: Identify creator/UGC partners aligned with brand (use Brand Collabs Manager)
Set up Partnership Ads in existing campaigns (Ads Manager → Ad level → Partnership Ad toggle)
Test 3-5 creator concepts in same ad set as BAU creative
Enable Dynamic Header Optimization for creative variation
Compare CTR + CPA vs standard ads → scale winners 20%+

what_it_solves: Causal measurement, not correlation. Defends spend.
activate_it: Open Ads Manager → Experiments → Conversion Lift
Define one test cell on top-spending campaign (min. $10k spend, 7-day window)
Configure conversion event + holdout group (Meta team can run setup for you)
Review lift report at end of test → use to defend run-rate vs CFO

what_it_solves: Faster learning phase. Less fragmentation = better delivery.
activate_it: Simplify or consolidate ad sets

what_it_solves: Same logic, app surface. Top lever for app advertisers.
activate_it: Audit Pixel/SDK value event coverage (Events Manager → Test Events)
Confirm value parity vs MMP (AppsFlyer / Adjust) on key events
Switch app campaign optimization goal: Conversions → Value
Set min ROAS bid floor + monitor 7d learning phase
Scale budget by 20-30% per week once exiting learning

what_it_solves: Surface high-affinity variants to keep refresh cadence up.
activate_it: Adopt related media suggestions

what_it_solves: Closes the loop between Meta delivery and your BI.
activate_it: Connect your Google analytics tooling to Meta

what_it_solves: #1 lever for BLS lift and learning-phase exit. Concentrated spend caps performance.
activate_it: Audit current creative split — flag if 1 creative >40% spend
Brief 3-5 distinct creative concepts per ad set (variant ≠ minor edit)
Mix formats: video + static + carousel within same ad set
Use Advantage+ Creative to auto-generate format variants
Refresh cadence: ≥1 new concept per 2 weeks per ad set

what_it_solves: Budget consolidation. Exits learning phase faster.
activate_it: Add Advantage+ campaign budget

what_it_solves: Net-new inventory. Early-mover advantage on rising surface.
activate_it: Adopt Threads Feed placement

what_it_solves: ML-optimized delivery across surfaces. Beats manual placement selection.
activate_it: Advantage+  placements

what_it_solves: Lets system mix-and-match assets for best per-placement combo.
activate_it: Enable flexible media

solution: Optimize your Pixel with High Intent Events

what_it_solves: Aligns delivery to business KPI vs proxy metric.
activate_it: Goal-based bidding
Create website and app ads

activate_it: Selecting Reels placements
Add Music

GenAI Video Expansion for FB Reels
